# Cristalina - Water Treatment Solutions

> Cristalina is a water treatment company based in Costa Rica, specializing in premium water purification systems for homes and businesses.

## Products

- **Water-Tec Premium**: Advanced home water purification system with multi-stage filtration technology.
- **Water-Tec Pro**: Commercial-grade water treatment solution designed for businesses and high-demand environments.

## Services

- Water quality assessment
- Installation of purification systems
- Maintenance and filter replacement
- Technical support

## Contact

- Phone: +(506) 8849-5919
- Address: 50 E. del B.C.R. - Urb. Vizcaya No.87, San Rafael Abajo de Desamparados, San Jose, Costa Rica
- Website: https://www.cristalinacr.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Cristalina.Agua.Pura

## Languages

This website is available in Spanish (es) and English (en).

- Spanish: https://www.cristalinacr.com/es/inicio
